posts.text:
Hey Alabama friends, be safe tonight. Birmingham warning too & I just got a call from the UA alert system in Tuscaloosa.


James Spann (@spann)

HUN issues Tornado Warning [tornado: RADAR INDICATED, hail: 1.00 IN] for Colbert, Lauderdale [AL] till 10:15 PM CDT mesonet.agron.iastate.edu/vt…





— https://nitter.net/spann/status/2033370721154425127#m

Here’s the highlight reel of last week’s posts and events from my newsletter, Civil Discourse. Grab a cup of coffee and get ready to catch up on anything you may have missed. open.substack.com/pub/joycev…

I wrote about this, and what it means for the First Amendment, last night. Get the history & the analysis here: joycevance.substack.com/p/at…

nytimes.com/2026/03/14/world…?
“Nothing like casual threats to free speech on a Saturday morning in America.” open.substack.com/pub/joycev…

Trump and his FCC Chair Brendan Carr are attacking the 1st Amendment again. It would be easy to miss this story in the press of the news, but our continued exercise of our 1st Amendment rights & advocacy for the principle itself are essential to its survival—it’s a fundamental threat to Trump’s ability to accumulate more power. open.substack.com/pub/joycev…

Could a Democrat take MTG's seat in Georgia? Shawn Harris, the retired General who came in 1st in the special election & now faces a runoff, made a believer of me when I met him this morning. Listening to him talk about what country over party looks like is refreshing. open.substack.com/pub/joycev…

Congratulations on still living rent-free in his head. Badge of honor. And all the more reason for people to watch you on your new platform @Acosta


Jim Acosta (@Acosta)

Honored to be included here. But seriously what’s wrong with this guy? This is some goofy stuff.



— https://nitter.net/Acosta/status/2032865331182469594#m

TSA agents who aren’t getting a paycheck & Americans waiting in long lines in airports are paying the price for what ICE did in Minneapolis & elsewhere.


Homeland Dems (@HomelandDems)

REPUBLICANS BLOCK CLEAN FUNDING FOR TSA AGAIN.  Democrats are ready and willing to pay these brave officers and agents today. It’s pathetic Republicans won’t join us.



— https://nitter.net/HomelandDems/status/2031814950713274560#m

So, @GeoffRBennett
has a new book, Black Out Loud, & it’s nothing you’re expecting and everything you want to read right now, so I got him to talk with me about it & about what it’s like to be in the anchor chair for NewsHour. joycevance.substack.com/p/fi…

At the time, the grotesquely large settlements, which seemed out of touch with the weakness of the cases, were justified because Trump would never touch a dime—the money was for charity, or at least his library. We shall see.


Rep. Melanie Stansbury (@Rep_Stansbury)

Remember when Trump sued ABC, Meta, X, and Paramount, and they all agreed to settle for millions of dollars?  

Well, that money was supposed to go to Trump’s future presidential library fund—except that fund has been dissolved wit

Who did not see this one coming? Shades of Ghislaine Maxwell, who negotiated a better deal for herself in custody by saying what the administration wanted her to say.


Joshua Hall (@JoshHall2024)

🚨BREAKING:🚨 Former Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro is reportedly sitting down with Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard to demonstrate how Venezuelan voting machines and software have been tampering with American elections on behalf of the Democratic Party. He is prepared to testify aga

When you’ve lost Thom Tillis…


Senator Thom Tillis (@SenThomTillis)

This ruling confirms just how weak and frivolous the criminal investigation of Chairman Powell is and it is nothing more than a failed attack on Fed independence.  

We all know how this is going to end and the D.C. U.S. Attorney’s Office should save itself further embarrassment and move on.  

Appealing the ruling will only delay the confirmation of Kevin Warsh as the next Fed Chair.



— https://nitter.net/SenThomTillis/stat
The appropriate number of eligible American Citizens who should be denied the right to vote is ZERO. Oppose the SAVE Act & other voter suppression measures.

Farmer and retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris, the Georgia Democrat in the runoff to replace MTG in Congress, joins us for coffee Saturday morning. His background makes him a qualified & compelling candidate. Leave your questions for him in the chat and join us! open.substack.com/pub/joycev…

It’s hard to feel prepared for all the legal news that’s coming at you in a week like this where there is so much of it. Here is my modest effort to help you get there. 

open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

Here’s the highlight reel of last week’s posts and events from my newsletter, Civil Discourse. Grab a cup of coffee and get ready to catch up on anything you may have missed. open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

I wrote about this, and what it means for the First Amendment, last night. Get the history & the analysis here: joycevance.substack.com/p/attacking-...

www.nytimes.com/2026/03/14/w...
Glad you feel that way. We really enjoy doing it and it forces us to think critically.

So, Geoff Bennett has a new book, Black Out Loud, & it’s nothing you’re expecting and everything you want to read write now, so I got him to talk with me about it & about what it’s like to be in the anchor chair for NewsHour.

Farmer and retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris, the Georgia Democrat in the runoff to replace MTG in Congress, joins us for coffee Saturday morning. His background makes him a qualified & compelling candidate. Leave your questions for him in the chat and join us! open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

On a Thursday in America…
joycevance.substack.com/p/thursday-i...
I really don’t care…

Today, Justice Barrett said “Freedom of speech & freedom of religion commit us to pluralism. They commit us to tolerance. They…allow to be heard even those viewpoints that we might disagree with.”
So, what does she make of Trump, who lacks that commitment? open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

When the President decides photojournalists can’t take pictures at Sec’y Hegseth’s Iran briefings, it’s not a small thing. We’re connecting the dots to the larger efforts to erode our 1st Amendment rights, just when we need them the most. open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

One of the law firms Trump tried to intimidate with an executive order is representing Anthropic in court. Here are the details of the two lawsuits against the government after DOD tried to blacklist the developer of Claude AI. 
open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

The corruption, waste, and greed of this entire administration is beyond cataloguing. But @joycewhitevance.bsky.social does a nice job skewering our new Special Envoy for the Shield of the Americas. Laugh or cry. open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

Why did DOJ continue defending President Trump’s EOs targeting law firms after abandoning its appeal just one day earlier? @preetbharara.bsky.social and I discuss the latest on a new episode of @cafedotcom.bsky.social Insider. Listen: cafe.visitlink.me/_QzX32

The Coast Guard’s new facility is in Birmingham, Alabama, which isn’t on the water. A parting gift from outgoing DHS Secy Kristi Noem: 
open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

If you need some pictures of chickens tonight, I’m here for you. 
joycevance.substack.com/p/a-night-of...

“The subpoena was issued in recent days to the Arizona State Senate, which oversaw a sprawling but partisan audit of the vote result that was ordered by Senate Republicans in Maricopa County in the months after Donald J. Trump lost to Joseph R. Biden Jr.”
 www.nytimes.com/2026/03/09/n...

The government just told a federal court:
“Courts cannot tell the President what to say.”

That’s the theory behind Trump’s latest clash with the judiciary—and it could end up before the Supreme Court. open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...
"It’s almost as though the government’s lawyers don’t know there’s a Constitution out there..." @joycewhitevance.bsky.social
